# hkguide.org — HK Landing Guide

> A free, open-source knowledge hub for mainland China companies and talent landing in Hong Kong. Covers government subsidies (BUD, TVP, EMF, ITSP), company setup, talent visa schemes (TTPS, QMAS, ASMTP, TechTAS), family settlement, and children's education pathways.

This site is maintained as a public resource. Content is factual, government-source-cited, and regularly updated. Licensed CC BY 4.0.

## Sections

- /zh-hans/subsidies/ — 香港政府补贴资助指南
  - bud-fund.md — BUD 专项基金：最高700万港元资助
  - tvp-technology-voucher.md — TVP 科技券：60万港元助中小企数字化
  - emf-marketing-fund.md — EMF 中小企业市场推广基金
  - hkstp-cyberport-incubation.md — 科学园与数码港：3年免租+100万概念验证
  - innovation-guiding-fund.md — 100亿创科产业引导基金
- /zh-hans/company/ — 公司注册与落地操作
  - register-hk-company.md — 内地企业注册香港公司完整指南
- /zh-hans/talent/ — 人才签证计划
  - ttps-high-talent-pass.md — 高才通（TTPS）三类通道指南
  - qmas-quality-migrant.md — 优才计划（QMAS）2026新政12项准则
- /zh-hans/family/ — 家庭安置
  - children-education-pathway.md — 来港人才子女教育全景
- /zh-hans/going-global/ — 出海架构与税务优惠
  - hk-as-launchpad.md — 从香港出海：全球化跳板
- /en/subsidies/ — HK government funding programmes (coming soon)
- /en/company/ — Company registration & setup (coming soon)
- /en/talent/ — Talent admission schemes (coming soon)
- /en/family/ — Family settlement guide (coming soon)
- /en/going-global/ — Going global from HK (coming soon)
